name: Patreon Creator API
what_it_does: Patreon API for creator membership and subscription management. Enables programmatic access to patron data, subscription tiers, campaign analytics, and membership records. Used by creators to integrate Patreon memberships with other tools and automate patron management workflows.
use_cases: Querying Patreon patron lists and subscription tiers for membership management agents
Retrieving campaign earnings and patron analytics from creator business reporting agents
Syncing patron data with Discord, Slack, or other platforms from community automation agents
Generating membership reports and patron cohort analysis from business intelligence agents
not_for: One-time product sales (Patreon is subscription/membership focused)
Anonymous or public content distribution (requires patron authentication)
best_when: A creator using Patreon wants AI agents to manage patron data, sync memberships with other platforms, and generate creator business analytics.
avoid_when: You need to modify patron charges or subscription pricing autonomously. FINANCIAL RISK: Patron billing data and subscription changes require human creator oversight.

auth.notes: Patreon OAuth 2.0. Register app at Patreon developer portal. Scopes include identity, campaigns, and member data. Use minimal scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Patreon API free; Patreon takes 5-12% of creator earnings
pricing.paid_tiers: Patreon Pro and Premium tiers for additional features
pricing.notes: Patreon API access is free for creators. Patreon takes percentage of membership revenue.

performance.rate_limits: Patreon API: 300 requests per minute per client

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Patron billing and subscription data is sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Patreon API v2 uses JSON:API format — parsing complexity for agents
Patron data includes personal information — GDPR compliance for EU patrons
Subscription changes affect creator revenue — require human oversight
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Creator earnings and patron billing data. PCI-DSS. Patron PII (email, location). OAuth scopes for data minimization.

security_score_components.security_notes: Creator earnings and patron personal data. PCI-DSS. GDPR for EU patrons. Subscription changes require human oversight.
